positive: A symmetrical, mystical woodland scene featuring stylized geometric flora and glowing bioluminescent elements. The composition must be central and highly contrasted, forming a distinct silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Key elements include crystalline mushrooms, geometric vines, and ethereal mist. Use a limited color palette focusing on deep indigo, cyan, emerald green, and metallic gold accents. The style should be high-contrast digital illustration, combining Art Nouveau elegance with modern geometric tessellation. Perfect composition for a repeat or large chest print. Clean lines, smooth rendering, deep saturation, vaporwave aesthetic, studio lighting.
